text:
Owner-curated remaining direct resource records
My Nawashi is the owner-recommended natural-fiber rope shop at https://www.etsy.com/shop/MyNawashi. The Etsy page returned bot challenges and rate limits during review, so no current catalog claims are supported.
The owner-recommended single-column lesson is Deep dive into Single Column Tie by Tying with Friends at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vnDvjAaQU8g. Its advertised auto-generated transcript was not retrievable in the review client.
The owner-recommended hip-harness playlist is Hips and Peaches Ties References, curated by rope365, at https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkrdRffh_Gg2S9QccbRyiLE5x4SIacgoM. The curator says that compilation is not endorsement and advises viewer discretion.
The owner-recommended Struggler's Knot and Somerville Bowline lesson is SHIBARI TUTORIAL: Struggler vs Somerville by WykD Dave at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OsIcEtCoKHo. Anonymous playback required sign-in to confirm age during review, and captions were not accessible anonymously.
The existing combined video-directory record repeats the same three URLs already represented by the individual single-column, hip-harness, and Struggler-versus-Somerville resource records and adds no independent instructional fact.
title: Owner-curated remaining direct resource records
